lint.command: No lint script defined in package.json; per project guidance, no lint command exists.

blockingIssues.description: The no-runtime startup path still sets `marketDataRuntimeState.initialSyncCompleted = true` directly without advancing `hotDataRevision`. Because `/simple/price` and `/coins/markets` now only invalidate on revision mismatch, any cached responses created before this direct state transition would remain valid for up to the TTL and can contradict the new post-sync policy. The shared invalidation contract should be driven from every state transition that changes hot-endpoint visibility, not only from `createMarketRuntime()`.

The bootstrap-only success path in `src/app.ts` clears `syncFailureReason` after a successful initial sync but does not reset `allowStaleLiveService` to `false`, leaving runtime freshness/source-class state inconsistent with the fresh data actually being served and diverging from the background-runtime recovery path.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/runtime.md` to record that successful recovery transitions must clear stale/failure flags consistently across bootstrap-only and background runtime paths, in addition to bumping `hotDataRevision` for visibility changes.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document that hot-endpoint cache coherence depends on every visibility/freshness transition advancing `hotDataRevision`, including the no-runtime `onReady` bootstrap path.
